name: forgeloop
description: Tracker-driven engineering workflows with Specs, Tickets, dual review, repair, integration, and acceptance gates.

interface.shortDescription: Design and deliver Tracker work through independent review and acceptance gates
interface.longDescription: A Tracker-driven Codex workflow suite for repository setup, design discovery, Spec and Ticket publication, serial Initiative execution, independent Spec and Standards review, bounded repair, integration, recovery, and final acceptance.
defaultPrompt: 使用 Forgeloop 配置当前仓库的 Tracker、领域文档与集成策略。
使用 Forgeloop 将当前讨论发布为 Spec，并拆成可独立验证的 Tickets。
使用 Forgeloop 从正式 Spec 运行 Coder、双 Reviewer 与最终验收闭环。
